args.thought: User wants GLD probability distribution in 30 days. This requires markov_distribution tool which needs: (1) Polymarket price threshold markets for gold/GLD, (2) current price, (3) historical prices. I should first search Polymarket for gold price level markets, get current GLD price, then run markov_distribution with trajectory=false for a 30-day horizon distribution.

args.thought: I have Polymarket gold price markets and need to convert them to GLD equivalents. GLD tracks ~1/10th ounce of gold, so Gold $X → GLD ~$X/10. Current GLD is ~$415-430. For 30-day horizon, I should use the June expiry markets (most liquid) and convert: Gold $5,500→GLD $550 (39.8%), $6,000→$600 (10.5%), $4,200→$420 (32.0%), $3,800→$380 (10.6%). I also need to build a historical price array from the web search data - I have ~20+ data points from Feb-Mar 2026. Let me construct the historical prices array and run markov_distribution.
